title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Google DeepMind unveiled Co-Scientist, a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system that iteratively generates, debates, and evolves novel scientific hypotheses for complex problems. The system aims to accelerate scientific breakthroughs by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses.
